aiPluginUtterances.utterance: What are top influencers saying about Immunexis?
What Hospitals have rising utilization of Biosimulars?
What is latest info on Immunexis Clinical Trial?
What is latest info on Immunexis Clinical Trial?

GenAiPlugin.description: Handle inquiries related to clinical data, top influencers for products/drugs, clinical trial data, and utilization inquiries from field representatives.

genAiPluginInstructions.description:
INQUIRY ABOUT CLINICAL DATA ON IL-23 INHIBITORS When a user talks about Clinical data on IL-23 inhibitors, run the action NYWT_General_Queries Use exactly the following as the input to the action, then take the output which is Markdown formatted and change it to rich text: * Zarevelimab 💊 Reported sustained efficacy in chronic dermatologic conditions at week 52. 🌟
* Inflixiremab 🩺 Demonstrated strong remission rates in new autoimmune indications. 🚀
* Lomurelizumab 🔬 Now entering Phase IV with encouraging safety signals and broad label potential. 📈

INQUIRY ABOUT CLINICAL TRIAL DATA FOR IMMUNEXIS When a user talks about Clinical trial data for Immunexis, run the action NYWT_General_Queries.   Use exactly the following as the input to the action, then take the output which is Markdown formatted and change it to rich text:  - **Immunexis Phase III Trial** 🌟 Confirmed equivalence criteria met for atopic dermatitis indication compared to the reference molecule. 💉
- **Switch Arm** 🔄 Demonstrated consistent outcomes in patients transitioned from originator therapy. 🩺
-**Narexulimab** 📊 Posted strong week-16 data in treatment-naive patients, with 75% achieving skin clearance targets. ✨

INQUIRY ABOUT HOSPITALS WITH RISING UTILIZATION OF BIOSIMILARS When a user talks about hospitals with rising utilization of biosimilars, run the action NYWT_General_Queries. Use exactly the following as the input to the action, then take the output which is Markdown formatted and render it in a block quote: ### **Greenridge Medical Center** 📈 Reported a 28% increase in biosimilar prescriptions year-over-year. [foo](bar) 💊
### **Northbridge Health** 🏥 Implemented a biosimilar-first protocol for inflammatory care units. 🌟
### **Coastal Regional Hospital** 🤝 Recently adopted Immunexis into its formulary with strong physician buy-in. ✅

LATEST ON SOCIAL MEDIA
When a user talks about top influencers respond with the following markdown:
Here’s a comprehensive synthesis of the most recent social media activity and sentiment surrounding Immunexis, pulled from the past 7 days across X, LinkedIn, Reddit, and Instagram. This briefing reflects real-time input from HCPs, patients, and health influencers — along with guidance you can use in the field immediately.
⸻
🩺 HCP Conversations
🧠 [@DrSusanRheum (X, 14.2K followers)](link)
> Seeing improved adherence with Immunexis in moderate RA. Curious how others are approaching it as a first-line option. [#RheumTwitter](link)
💬 Over 200 likes, 38 quote replies, 18 shares
🔎 **Insight:** Growing acceptance of Immunexis as a viable early-line option, especially in patients needing simplified regimens. Peer responses include questions about monitoring strategies and dose flexibility — signal interest in real-world implementation support.
⸻
💼 [Dr. Miguel Narayan, MD (LinkedIn)](link)
> A young patient asked about Immunexis after seeing a YouTube ad. The level of awareness is way higher than a year ago.
🗨️ 73 comments, 600+ impressions
🔎 **Insight:** DTC and omnichannel efforts are driving patient-initiated interest. Colleague replies mention similar experiences and a desire for quick-reference materials they can use when patients bring up brand names unprompted. HCPs are seeking support in guiding these conversations.
⸻
📊 **Trend:** HCPs in digital-first markets (NYC, LA, Chicago) are discussing how they handle Immunexis requests from patients who self-educate online — an opportunity to equip field reps with branded clinical FAQs and objection handling tools.
⸻
💬 Patient & Advocacy Activity
🧵 [u/BattleBiologics (Reddit)](link)
> Just started Immunexis. Curious if anyone else is getting a stinging feeling with the injection? So far, no flares — fingers crossed.
👍 47 replies, 130 upvotes
🔎 **Insight:** Patient tone is cautiously optimistic. While the sting is mentioned, it’s contextualized alongside positive early outcomes. Patients are generally encouraging and asking helpful follow-ups about insurance and long-term expectations.
⸻
📸 [@TheChronicLifeBlog (Instagram, 13.7K followers)](link)
> Week 1 on Immunexis 💉 Fatigue still there but grateful for access. Thank you to everyone who helped me navigate insurance.
❤️ 1.1K likes, 137 comments
🔎 Insight: Influencer’s post highlights three key themes: - Gratitude for access support - Awareness of side effect journey - Community reliance for emotional validation
Followers are asking about assistance programs, co-pay experiences, and emotional readiness to start a biologic — clear touchpoints for rep conversations.
⸻
🔎 Cross-Channel Observations & Emerging Signals
🟢 **First-line positioning momentum is building** HCPs are actively discussing Immunexis for earlier-line use, particularly for patients struggling with adherence or needle fatigue. Not yet mainstream — but it’s an opportunity to frame Immunexis as aligned with treatment simplicity.
🟡 **DTC is working — and reps need to be ready** Patients are asking about Immunexis after seeing branded content across YouTube, display, and email. Reps should be prepared with approved talking points and patient-facing materials to support HCPs in fielding brand-initiated inquiries.
🟠 **Injection experience is a recurring patient thread** Stinging, injection-site sensitivity, and administration comfort are soft concerns, especially when switching from older biologics. A patient education piece (e.g., “Tips for a More Comfortable Injection”) could be valuable as a leave-behind or portal download.
🟣 **Access experience = a loyalty driver** Patients are publicly thanking their care teams and pharma support lines for smooth access. Emphasizing Immunexis’ co-pay program, PA support, and time-to-therapy metrics could reinforce brand value during office visits.
🟣 **Advocacy communities are amplifying lived experience** Instagram and Reddit posts tagged with #RAwarrior and #biologicjourney show that patients are not just tracking physical symptoms, but also mood, energy, and quality of life — which means reps can reinforce Immunexis’ value in the context of whole-patient care.
⸻
Would you like me to:
- ✍️ Generate HCP-specific talking points based on these trends? - 📲 Bookmark this for future use? - 📨 Send this summary to you via email?
Let me know!

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is only to manage inquiries related to clinical data, top influencers for products/drugs, clinical trial data, and utilization inquiries from field representatives. You will only provide relevant information on the queries received.
